all_fetched_file_contents_merged_into_a_: All fetched file contents merged into a single text string (fetch)
all_file_contents_merged_into_a_single_t: All file contents merged into a single text string
allowed_emails_domains_for_email_or_sso_: Allowed emails/domains for email or SSO access (manage sharing)
allowed_emails_or_domain_patterns_for_em: Allowed emails or @domain patterns for email/SSO access
array_of_file_text_contents_one_entry_pe: Array of file text contents, one entry per file (get content)
array_of_parsed_file_objects_with_conten: Array of parsed file objects with content, metadata, and file properties
array_of_userfile_objects_for_downstream: Array of UserFile objects for downstream use (attachments, uploads, etc.)
comma_or_newline_separated_emails_or_dom: Comma- or newline-separated emails or @domain patterns
file_size_in_bytes_write_and_append: File size in bytes (write and append)
integrate_file_into_the_workflow_can_upl: Integrate File into the workflow. Can upload a file manually or insert a file url.
link_visibility_private_public_password_: Link visibility: private, public, password, email, or sso
operation_to_perform_read_fetch_write_or: Operation to perform (read, fetch, write, or append)
operation_to_perform_read_get_content_fe: Operation to perform (read, get content, fetch, write, or append)
operation_to_perform_read_get_write_or_a: Operation to perform (read, get, write, or append)
public_link_access_mode_public_password_: Public link access mode: public, password, email, or sso (manage sharing)
read_and_parse_files_from_uploads_or_url: Read and parse files from uploads or URLs, write new workspace files, or append content to existing files.
read_fetch_write_and_append_files: Read, fetch, write, and append files
read_get_content_fetch_write_append_comp: Read, get content, fetch, write, append, compress, decompress, and manage sharing for files
read_workspace_file_objects_extract_the_: Read workspace file objects, extract the text content of files, fetch and parse files from URLs with optional headers, write new workspace files, append content to existing files, compress files into a .zip archive, extract a .zip archive into the workspace, or manage the public share link for a file.
read_workspace_files_by_picker_or_canoni: Read workspace files by picker or canonical ID, fetch and parse files from URLs with optional headers, write new workspace files, or append content to existing files.
select_or_upload_a_workspace_file: Select or upload a workspace file
selected_file_or_workspace_file_id_for_g: Selected file or workspace file ID for get
selected_workspace_file_or_canonical_fil: Selected workspace file or canonical file ID for read
Selected workspace file or canonical file ID to extract content from
selected_workspace_files_or_canonical_fi: Selected workspace files or canonical file IDs to compress
selected_zip_archive_or_canonical_file_i: Selected .zip archive or canonical file ID to extract
url_to_access_the_file_write_and_append: URL to access the file (write and append), or the public share link when shared; empty when set to private (manage sharing)
whether_the_public_link_is_enabled_manag: Whether the public link is enabled (manage sharing)
whether_the_public_link_is_password_prot: Whether the public link is password-protected (manage sharing)
workspace_file_id_of_the_zip_archive: Workspace file ID of the .zip archive
workspace_file_id_or_json_array_of_ids: Workspace file ID or JSON array of IDs
workspace_file_objects_read_or_fetched_f: Workspace file objects (read) or fetched file objects (fetch)
workspace_file_objects_with_share_status: Workspace file objects with share status (read), fetched file objects (fetch), the compressed archive (compress), or extracted files (decompress)
